title: Development Schema — build-time slice (app.json)
description: Identity, branding, signing, and entitlement knobs that are baked into an iOS/Android binary at build time and therefore cannot change at runtime. Drives the white-label build pipeline (see docs/planning/07-configuration-whitelabel-theme.md). One file per client under configs/clients/<client>/app.json.

schemaFormatVersion.description: Version of the Development Schema format this document targets. Bumped when the format changes; migrations ship with upgraders.

clientId.description: Stable identifier matching the configs/clients/<clientId> directory name.

displayName.description: App name as shown on the home screen / App Store, per locale.

urlScheme.description: Custom URL scheme for deep links, e.g. acme-marketplace

signing.description: References to signing identity — never secrets. Actual credentials are managed by Fastlane Match / CI secrets, not this file.
